Conceptual definition: Walking access to public transport and shared-mobility entry points.
OSM POI types included: bicycle rental; bus station; car sharing; platform; station; stop position; subway entrance; tram stop

Conceptual definition: Access to healthcare and health-supporting services (high-priority basic service).
OSM POI types included: clinic; dentist; doctors; hospital; nursing home; pharmacy; veterinary; bank

Conceptual definition: Access to learning resources from childcare to higher education.
OSM POI types included: child care; childcare; college; kindergarten; school; university

Conceptual definition: Access to food retail and dining options (daily provisioning).
OSM POI types included: supermarket; convenience; marketplace; wholesale; farm; greengrocer; restaurant; fast food; food court; cafe; ice cream; bakery; baking oven; butcher; dairy; deli; frozen food; cheese; seafood; spices; pasta; health food

Conceptual definition: Social infrastructure and civic/community destinations supporting social cohesion.
OSM POI types included: community centre; social centre; social facility; townhall; library; public bookcase; allotments; fountain; coworking; place of worship

Conceptual definition: Destinations enabling physical activity and outdoor recreation.
OSM POI types included: park; garden; playground; dog park; gym; fitness centre; fitness station; sports centre; pitch; track; swimming pool; swimming area
bar; pub; biergarten; cinema; theatre; arts centre; events venue; amusement arcade; casino; nightclub; dance
union of all above POI types
